subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1915-11-13 in Haifa
subcodes.first_line: His Holiness Christ counseleth these peoples unto peace and tranquility. He saith: "Sheathe thy sword, O nations..." [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حضرت مسیح اینها را نصیحت می کند بصلح و سکون.  می فرماید: شمشیر را غلاف کن، این دول
subcodes.subjects: @Christ; Christianity, @suffering; rejection of Christ, @war and peace, @words vs deeds, @Manifestation of God as gardener; cultivator
